_comment: Committee-side touchpoint cadence only. This is a scheduling-convenience note maintained by Priya, NOT the partner system of record. Verify any partner's real standing against Salesforce and the signed-agreement store before acting. Nothing in this file resolves partner status, duplicates, opt-outs, or MOU state - those decisions belong to Ben against the authoritative sources.
authority_note: If this note and Salesforce disagree, Salesforce and the signed store win. Flag disagreements for Ben; do not reconcile them here.

cadence_key.paused: no scheduled contact; awaiting Ben's direction

contact_channels.note: Partner-facing sends go out under the committee inbox after Ben's sign-off; never from a personal address

touchpoints.note: Coordination handled on the Habitat partner board; confirm logistics there. Standing is not decided in this file.
Sometimes appears under an old 'Harbor Meals' label in export tools; treat as the same relationship until Ben confirms against Salesforce. Do not create a second partner record from this note.
Paperwork still moving; do not assume anything is final from this note. Agreement state is decided only against the signed-agreement store, not here.
Quiet lately; Nathan Beal is the internal bridge. Whether to re-engage is Ben's call.
Records disagree on whether this is still going; one tool shows lapsed, another shows recent activity. Flag for Ben and hold as an open question rather than guessing. Do not assign a status here.

reminders: Suppression is absolute: any partner or contact who has opted out never appears in a send, regardless of what this convenience note says.
A draft partner note is not a sent partner note; nothing leaves under the church name without Ben's yes.
Reconcile partner identity against Salesforce before merging or splitting any record.
